mapper.select: /* SQL ID : listLessonStudyRecordByTime 설 명 : 학습기록 목록 조회 (by 교시) */ SELECT A.STD_ID , A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , A.SBJCT_ID /* , A.ATNDLC_STSCD */ , NVL(A.STUDY_CNT, 0) AS STUDY_CNT , NVL(A.STUDY_SESSION_TM, 0) AS STUDY_SESSION_TM , NVL(A.STUDY_TOTAL_TM, 0) AS STUDY_TOTAL_TM , NVL(A.STUDY_AFTER_TM, 0) AS STUDY_AFTER_TM , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM , A.STUDY_SESSION_DTTM , NVL(RCNT_ATNDLC_PSTN, '0') AS RCNT_ATNDLC_PSTN , NVL((SELECT ATNDLC_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID),'STUDY') AS ATNDLC_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD A, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = #{lessonTimeId} AND B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ORDER BY B.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ

/* SQL ID : selectLessonStudyRecord 설 명 : 학습기록 조회 */ SELECT STD_ID , SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , SBJCT_ID , ATNDLC_STSCD , STUDY_CNT , STUDY_SESSION_TM , STUDY_TOTAL_TM , STUDY_AFTER_TM , ATNDLC_SDTTM , STUDY_SESSION_DTTM , RCNT_ATNDLC_PSTN FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD WHERE 1=1 AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : selectLessonStudyState 설 명 : 학습상태 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT LCTR_SCHDL_ID , STD_ID , SBJCT_ID , USER_ID , ATNDLC_STSCD , STUDY_STATUS_CD_BAK , ATTEND_REASON FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE WHERE 1=1 AND LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} ) A WHERE ROWNUM = 1

/* SQL ID : listLessonStudyPageBySchedule 설 명 : 페이지 학습 기록 목록 조회 (by scheduleId) */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , A.STD_ID , A.PAGE_SEQNO , A.SBJCT_ID , A.STUDY_CNT , A.STUDY_SESSION_TM , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM , A.STUDY_SESSION_DTTM , A.RCNT_ATNDLC_PSTN , NVL(A.PRGR_RATIO, 0) PRGR_RATIO FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_PAGE A, TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD B, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS C WHERE 1=1 AND A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = #{lessonTimeId} AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId}
mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : saveLessonStudyPageBasicList 설 명 : 페이지 학습기록 기본값 목록 저장 */ INSERT IGNORE INTO TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_PAGE ( SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , STD_ID , PAGE_SEQNO , SBJCT_ID , STUDY_CNT , STUDY_SESSION_TM , ATNDLC_SDTTM , STUDY_SESSION_DTTM , RCNT_ATNDLC_PSTN , PRGR_RATIO , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES
( #{item.lessonCntsId} , #{item.stdNo} , #{item.pageCnt} , #{item.crsCreCd} , 0 , 0 , FN_DTTM() , FN_DTTM() , 0 , 0 , #{item.userId} , FN_DTTM() , #{item.userId} , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.sql: SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.STD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.ATNDLC_STSCD , A.STUDY_STATUS_CD_BAK , NVL((SELECT SUM(STUDY_TOTAL_TM) AS STUDY_TOTAL_TM FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD R, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS S, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM T WHERE 1=1 AND R.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND R.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = S.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND S.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = T.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND S.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = T.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND T.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID ),0) STUDY_TOTAL_TM , NVL((SELECT SUM(STUDY_AFTER_TM) AS STUDY_AFTER_TM FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD R, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS S, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM T WHERE 1=1 AND R.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND R.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = S.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND S.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = T.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND S.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = T.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND T.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID ),0) STUDY_AFTER_TM FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE A, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL B, TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT C WHERE 1=1 AND A.STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND C.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : listLessonStudyStateTm 설 명 : 수강생 강의 주차 학습상태 목록 조회(시간포함) */
ORDER BY B.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ

/* SQL ID : selectLessonStudySeminar 설 명 : 수강생 강의 주차 학습상태 조회(세미나) */ SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , B.STD_ID , B.USER_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN B.ATND_STSCD = 'ATTEND' THEN 'COMPLETE' WHEN B.ATND_STSCD = 'ABSENT' THEN 'NOSTUDY' ELSE B.ATND_STSCD END) AS ATNDLC_STSCD , NULL AS STUDY_STATUS_CD_BAK , 0 AS STUDY_TOTAL_TM , 0 AS STUDY_AFTER_TM FROM TB_LMS_SMNR AS A JOIN TB_LMS_SMNR_ATND AS B ON A.SMNR_ID = B.SMNR_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} GROUP BY A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID, B.STD_ID, B.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : LessonStudyDAO.listLessonStudyRecord 설 명 : 수강생 주차 학습기록 */ SELECT D.STD_ID , D.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , D.SBJCT_ID , D.ATNDLC_STSCD , D.STUDY_STATUS_CD_BAK , D.STUDY_CNT , D.STUDY_SESSION_TM , D.STUDY_TOTAL_TM , D.STUDY_AFTER_TM , D.ATNDLC_SDTTM , D.STUDY_SESSION_DTTM , D.RCNT_ATNDLC_PSTN , D.ATNDLC_MAX_PSTN , D.PRGR_RATIO , D.RGTR_ID , D.FRST_INQ_DTTM , D.MDFR_ID , D.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS C ON B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD D ON C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = D.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND D.STD_ID = #{stdNo} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId}

/* SQL ID : LessonStudyDAO.listLessonStudyDetail 설 명 : 수강생 주차 학습기록 상세 */ SELECT E.ATNDLC_RCD_DTL_ID , E.STD_ID , E.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , E.SBJCT_ID , IFNULL(E.STUDY_CNT,1) AS STUDY_CNT , E.ATNDLC_MNTS , E.ATNDLC_BRWSR , E.ATNDLC_CNTN_DVC_CD , E.STD_ID , E.RGTR_IP , E.RGTR_ID , E.FRST_INQ_DTTM , E.MDFR_ID , E.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS C ON B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD D ON C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = D.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND D.STD_ID = #{stdNo} JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_DETAIL E ON D.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = E.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND D.STD_ID = E.STD_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId}

/* SQL ID : LessonStudyDAO.listLessonStudyPage 설 명 : 수강생 페이지 학습 기록 */ SELECT F.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , F.STD_ID , F.PAGE_SEQNO , F.SBJCT_ID , F.STUDY_CNT , F.STUDY_SESSION_TM , F.ATNDLC_SDTTM , F.STUDY_SESSION_DTTM , F.RCNT_ATNDLC_PSTN , F.PRGR_RATIO , F.RGTR_ID , F.FRST_INQ_DTTM , F.MDFR_ID , F.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS C ON B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD D ON C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = D.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND D.STD_ID = #{stdNo} JOIN SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE E ON C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = E.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_PAGE F ON D.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = F.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND D.STD_ID = F.STD_ID AND E.PAGE_SEQNO = F.PAGE_SEQNO WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId}

/* SQL ID : LessonStudyDAO.selectLessonSchedule 설 명 : 학습주차 조회(학습기록 참조용) */ SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SYMD , A.LCTR_EYMD , A.LCTR_RCG_SYMD , A.LCTR_RCG_EYMD , A.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS , B.PRG_RFLTYN , (SELECT MAX(IFNULL(LCTR_RCG_EYMD, LCTR_EYMD)) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS LT_DETM_TO_DT_MAX , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS AA WHERE AA.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.PRG_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND (AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO' OR (AA.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO_LINK' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = AA.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND DELYN = 'N'))) ) AS PRGR_VIDEO_CNT FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS B WHERE 1=1 AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} AND B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{lessonCntsId}

/* SQL ID : LessonStudyDAO.selectOtherCntsStudyTm 설 명 : 주차의 현재콘텐츠 제외 학습기록 조회 */ SELECT A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , IFNULL(SUM(STUDY_TOTAL_TM), 0) AS STUDY_TOTAL_TM , IFNULL(SUM(STUDY_AFTER_TM), 0) AS STUDY_AFTER_TM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS C ON B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.PRG_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND (C.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO' OR (C.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO_LINK' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE X WHERE X.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID))) AND C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID != #{lessonCntsId} JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD D ON C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = D.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND D.STD_ID = #{stdNo} WHERE A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} GROUP BY A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID
/* SQL ID : LessonStudyDAO.listStdRecordForTrans 설 명 : 학습기록 목록 조회(선수강과목 이관용) */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD WHERE 1=1 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND RGTR_ID != 'tmpuser'
/* SQL ID : LessonStudyDAO.listStdStateForTrans 설 명 : 학습상태 목록 조회(선수강과목 이관용) */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE WHERE 1=1 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID != 'tmpuser'
/* SQL ID : listLessonStudyPageForTrans 설 명 : 페이지 학습 기록 목록 조회(선수강과목 이관용) */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_PAGE WHERE 1=1 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND RGTR_ID != 'tmpuser'
